title: Analyses
description: The Analyses module brings together a suite of epidemiological and clinical research methods, including characterisation, incidence rate estimation, treatment pathways, population-level estimation, patient-level prediction, and self-controlled case series. Studies and study packages allow researchers to bundle and export analysis specifications for reproducible research.
tips: Begin with Characterisation to understand the baseline demographics and clinical profiles of your cohorts before running comparative analyses.
Use Incidence Rates to calculate event rates within cohorts and stratify results by age, gender, or calendar year.
Package your analysis specifications as Study Packages to share reproducible research artefacts with collaborators.
Leverage Population-Level Estimation for causal inference questions using comparative cohort or self-controlled designs.
Patient-Level Prediction models can be validated across multiple data sources using the built-in cross-validation workflows.
